qa_pairs.question: Which courses have students who registered on or after 2004-12-24 12:36:46 and left on or after 1999-08-24 00:07:10?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT courses.course_id FROM courses
JOIN student_enrolment_courses ON courses.course_id = student_enrolment_courses.course_id
JOIN student_enrolment ON student_enrolment_courses.student_enrolment_id = student_enrolment.student_enrolment_id
JOIN students ON student_enrolment.student_id = students.student_id
WHERE students.date_first_registered >= '2004-12-24 12:36:46' AND students.date_left >= '1999-08-24 00:07:10'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which courses entities having at least one related student enrolment courses record (linked on courses.course_id = student_enrolment_courses.course_id), whose student enrolment courses record itself has at least one related student enrolment record (linked on student_enrolment_courses.student_enrolment_id = student_enrolment.student_enrolment_id), whose student enrolment record itself has at least one related students record (linked on student_enrolment.student_id = students.student_id) with date first registered at least '2004-12-24 12:36:46' and date left at least '1999-08-24 00:07:10'?

qa_pairs.question: Which courses named la with description n were taken by Reva Golda, whose SSN is 39, cell number is (507)365-8405, first registered on 2017-01-04 08:10:25, and whose other details are nesciunt?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT courses.course_id FROM courses
JOIN student_enrolment_courses ON courses.course_id = student_enrolment_courses.course_id
JOIN student_enrolment ON student_enrolment_courses.student_enrolment_id = student_enrolment.student_enrolment_id
